channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Economic data, commodities and markets
item.description: "Stay ahead of the curve with the latest economic insights. Get the latest updates on economic data, commodities, and markets from around the world. Check out the full report here: https://www.economist.com/economic-and-financial-indicators/2026/03/26/economic-data-commodities-and-markets and stay informed about the trends shaping the global economy."
